_instructions.pdf_support: Place a PDF as 'slides.pdf' in the slides folder

title: Future of Work with AI
subtitle: skills, creativity & the next generation!
overview: This session explores how Artificial Intelligence is transforming jobs, careers, and industries around the world. Students learn about future-ready skills, human creativity, collaboration with AI tools, and how technology can create new opportunities instead of just replacing work.

images._note: Add photos of AI tools, future workplaces, teamwork activities, robotics, and student career discussions.

gallery._placeholder: ADD: Illustration of future workplace with AI
gallery.caption: Future workplaces may combine humans and AI systems

gallery._placeholder: ADD: Robotics or AI lab photo
gallery.caption: AI and robotics are transforming industries
Creativity and innovation remain valuable human skills

gallery._placeholder: ADD: Human working with AI assistant
gallery.caption: Humans and AI can work together productively

gallery._placeholder: ADD: Students using digital learning tools
gallery.caption: Continuous learning is important in the AI era
New careers will emerge with advancing technology

keyTopics: How AI is Changing Jobs and Industries
Future Skills — Creativity, Communication, Critical Thinking
AI Collaboration — Humans working alongside technology
Emerging Careers — AI Engineer, Data Scientist, Robotics Expert
Lifelong Learning — Adapting to new technologies
Entrepreneurship Opportunities in the AI Era

resources.title: World Economic Forum - Future of Jobs

activity.title: Design a Future Career with AI
steps: Identify how AI could change those jobs
Brainstorm new careers that may exist in the future
Design a future workplace or startup idea
Present the future career idea to the class

quiz.q: What is one major impact of AI on work?
options: AI changes how tasks are performed
quiz.explanation: AI is transforming how work is done by automating certain tasks and creating new opportunities.

quiz.q: Which skill is highly valuable in the AI era?
quiz.explanation: Creativity helps humans innovate and solve problems in unique ways.
Automation allows machines and software to complete tasks automatically.

quiz.q: Which of these may become a future career?
quiz.explanation: Many new technology careers are emerging because of AI and innovation.
Continuous learning helps people adapt to new technologies and industries.

quiz.q: Which human quality is difficult for AI to fully replace?
quiz.explanation: Human empathy, creativity, and emotions remain unique strengths.
AI can support workers by handling repetitive work and improving efficiency.

quiz.q: What is an important future-ready skill?
quiz.explanation: Future careers require flexible thinking, communication, and adaptability.
Responsible AI ensures fairness, safety, and ethical use of technology.

quiz.q: What is one positive outcome of AI?
quiz.explanation: AI can create new jobs, industries, and opportunities for innovation.
